Bash(cd /home/ubuntu/workspace/AI-EDU/edulens-backend/services/conversation-engine

python3 -c "
import zipfile, os
with zipfile.ZipFile\('/tmp/conv-engine.zip', 'w', zipfile.ZIP_DEFLATED\) as zf:
    for root, dirs, files in os.walk\('.'\):
        skip = ['.git', 'src', 'test', 'tests', '__tests__', 'coverage', '.env']
        dirs[:] = [d for d in dirs if d not in skip]
        for f in files:
            if f.endswith\(\('.test.ts', '.test.js', '.spec.ts', '.md', '.ts', 'tsconfig.json'\)\):
                continue
            fp = os.path.join\(root, f\)
            zf.write\(fp, fp[2:]\)
print\('Done'\)
"

AWS_REGION=us-east-1 aws s3 cp /tmp/conv-engine.zip s3://cdk-hnb659fds-assets-163629398585-us-east-1/conv-engine-update2.zip --no-cli-pager 2>&1 | tail -1

for fn in edulens-student-chat-send-dev edulens-student-chat-create-dev edulens-parent-chat-send-dev edulens-parent-chat-create-dev; do
  AWS_REGION=us-east-1 aws lambda update-function-code \\
    --function-name $fn \\
    --s3-bucket cdk-hnb659fds-assets-163629398585-us-east-1 \\
    --s3-key conv-engine-update2.zip \\
    --no-cli-pager 2>&1 | grep "FunctionName"
done

echo "All updated")

python3 -c "
import json
d = json.load\(open\('/tmp/mr.json'\)\)
ok = sum\(1 for r in d['results'] if r.get\('ok'\)\)
fail = sum\(1 for r in d['results'] if not r.get\('ok'\)\)
print\(f'Inserted: {ok} OK, {fail} failed'\)
for r in d['results']:
    if not r.get\('ok'\):
        print\(f'  FAIL: {r.get\(\\"error\\",\\"\\"\)[:100]}'\)
")

  echo "$fn updated"
done)

import zipfile, os

")
